hyperedges.label: Audiobookshelf Application Manifests
Graphify Full Build Pipeline Steps
Pineapple Cluster Core Infrastructure
Longhorn-backed PVCs (commafeed, firefly-iii, homarr)
hyperedges.rationale: All three app PVCs use longhorn as the storageClassName and ReadWriteOnce access mode — they share the same storage backend pattern.

hyperedges.label: Kustomize base pattern (namespace+deployment+service+storage+secrets)
hyperedges.rationale: All four apps follow the same Kustomize base layout (namespace, deployment, service, storage, secrets), forming a consistent GitOps application pattern.

hyperedges.label: Apps running as UID/GID 33 (www-data)
hyperedges.rationale: Both commafeed and firefly-iii run with fsGroup/runAsUser/runAsGroup=33 (www-data), likely because their upstream images expect a web-server user context.

hyperedges.label: Shared media-pvc across Jellyfin, qBittorrent, and Radarr for hardlink-compatible media storage
qBittorrent and Radarr both pinned to urial-lab node via nodeAffinity for co-located media-pvc access
Prowlarr + qBittorrent + Radarr form an automated media acquisition pipeline (arr stack)
*arr Media Automation Stack (Sonarr+Radarr+Seerr)
hyperedges.description: Sonarr (TV), Radarr (movies), and Seerr (request UI) form the *arr media automation stack

hyperedges.label: Sonarr pinned to urial-lab with shared media-pvc
hyperedges.description: Sonarr is pinned via nodeAffinity to urial-lab and mounts the shared media-pvc for hardlink-compatible storage

hyperedges.label: Longhorn PVC Pattern across apps
hyperedges.description: All three apps use Longhorn storageClassName for their config PVCs following the same pattern

hyperedges.label: Cloudflare Tunnel Deployment Pattern
PostgreSQL-backed App Config Pattern
Staging Kustomize App Overlay Pattern
Arr-stack Apps in movietime Namespace
hyperedges.description: All arr-stack media automation apps (Prowlarr, Radarr, Sonarr, qBittorrent, Seerr) deployed in the movietime namespace together

hyperedges.label: FluxCD Kustomizations using SOPS Decryption
hyperedges.description: All major FluxCD Kustomizations (apps, databases, infrastructure) share the SOPS+Age decryption mechanism via the sops-age secret

hyperedges.label: Cloudflare Tunnel Deployments Across Staging Apps
hyperedges.description: All staging apps expose their services externally via a Cloudflare Tunnel sidecar deployment pattern using cloudflare/cloudflared:latest

hyperedges.label: CNPG Database Pattern: Cluster + LoadBalancer Service + External-DNS
hyperedges.rationale: Every database cluster (commafeed, firefly-iii, n8n, suwayomi) follows the same pattern: CNPG Cluster + LoadBalancer Service with cilium-lb-pool label + external-dns annotation, forming a consistent database exposure pattern.

hyperedges.label: Cilium LoadBalancer Network Stack: IP Pool + L2 Policy + Service Label
hyperedges.rationale: The pineapple-pool IP pool, the pineapple-policy L2 announcement policy, and all LoadBalancer services labelled cilium-lb-pool: pineapple-pool collectively form the Cilium-based bare-metal load balancing stack.

hyperedges.label: Databases Kustomize Tree: Root -> App Kustomizations -> Resources
hyperedges.rationale: The root databases kustomization fans out to per-app kustomizations which each compose namespace, secrets, CNPG cluster, and LoadBalancer service resources — a shared structural pattern across all database apps.

hyperedges.label: Service Exposure Pattern: Cilium LB + ExternalDNS + FlareSolverr
hyperedges.description: FlareSolverr service uses Cilium L2 announcements for LB IP assignment and ExternalDNS annotation for automatic DNS registration, forming the full service exposure pattern.

hyperedges.label: ExternalDNS Helm Deployment Flow
hyperedges.description: ExternalDNS is deployed as a HelmRelease drawing its chart from its HelmRepository and configuration from a ConfigMap generated from values.yaml.

hyperedges.label: CloudNativePG Bootstrap Resources
hyperedges.description: The CloudNativePG Kustomization bootstraps the cnpg-system namespace and the HelmRelease together as a coherent unit.

hyperedges.label: Renovate CronJob + ConfigMap + Secret runtime config
Spotdl CronJob reads playlist config and writes to music PVC
n8n exposed via cloudflared tunnel with staging configmap
kube-prometheus-stack deployment chain: repository -> release -> namespace
Monitoring staging overlay: controllers staging kustomization -> kps staging overlay -> kps base
Grafana TLS ingress: release -> ingress concept -> tls secret

nodes.label: Graphify Add URL and Watch Reference
nodes.norm_label: graphify add url and watch reference

nodes.label: Graphify GitHub Clone and Cross-Repo Merge Reference
nodes.norm_label: graphify github clone and cross-repo merge reference

nodes.label: Graphify Commit Hook and CLAUDE.md Integration Reference
nodes.norm_label: graphify commit hook and claude.md integration reference

nodes.label: Graphify Incremental Update and Cluster-Only Reference
nodes.norm_label: graphify incremental update and cluster-only reference

nodes.label: Graphify Knowledge Graph Build Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Designed to turn any corpus (code, docs, papers, images, video) into a persistent, queryable knowledge graph with community detection, honest audit trails (EXTRACTED/INFERRED/AMBIGUOUS), and multiple export formats. Parallel AST+semantic extraction minimizes time; caching avoids re-processing unchanged files.
